systemStatus.detail: (1) Sling Sun May 17 daily report ARRIVED 7:01 AM PT — 10 employees, 53.91 hours, 0 OT, 0 uncovered. Roster: Isael (Cook), Harmony Willson, Katharine Brown, Moe Danely, Fred De Leon not on today (Bartenders); Daniel Rodriguez, Gabriel Lopez galindo, Augustine Arroyo, Bri Kelley (Servers); Cal Carter (Barback); James Hernadez (Busser). (2) Sat May 16 Toast DPS NOT YET ARRIVED at 7:05 AM (expected ~7:38 AM). Latest Toast DPS = Fri May 15 (arrived May 16 7:39 AM PT) but Gmail MCP get_thread still returns no plaintext body — manual check required for Net/Gross/Guests/Orders/Labor%. (3) Yelp Ads: LIVE SCRAPE FRESH 7:05 AM PT. 30d: 56.7k impressions from ads (88%) / 776 page visits from ads (73%) / 189 leads from ads (80%). Billing May 1-16: $465.87 spend, $1.17 CPC, $3.95 CPL. (4) Google Ads scrape STILL BLOCKED — dashboard shows 'Turn off ad blockers' overlay; the ad blocker on ads.google.com hides the campaign table. Joal needs to disable ad blocker for ads.google.com. Stale snapshot from May 13 retained. 3 Ads report emails in last 24h, no disapprovals. (5) TripAdvisor: no new email in last 24h. (6) Reviews backlog: 8 unanswered. NEW Shailvi Wakhlu 5★ Google May 16 (1 day, top priority — 'Excellent salmon burger. Wonderful selection of beer tasters'). La Connolly 5★ May 15 (2 days). Dympna Pettit 5★ May 14 (3 days). Deimos Somied 5★ (7 days). Lisa O'Brien (36 days). (7) Reservations today (Sun May 17): 9 guests — Marisa Tyler 5:30 PM SpotHopper family gathering. Tomorrow Mon May 18: 0 bookings. (8) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.
